mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_log(session_id, user_id, agent_type, question, answer, tool_calls_json, latency_ms, status, error_msg) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{agentType}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{toolCallsJson}, #{latencyMs}, #{status}, #{errorMsg})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, agent_type, question, answer, tool_calls_json, latency_ms, status, error_msg, create_time FROM ai_chat_log WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, session_id, user_id, agent_type, question, answer, tool_calls_json, latency_ms, status, error_msg, create_time FROM ai_chat_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
